error_signature: always output data enabled causing blank record
title: If statement outputs blank record due to setting
symptom: The if statement sends a blank record to both branches when there is only one item, causing errors in the true path.
not_this_if: There are multiple records being processed
root_cause: When the 'always output data' option is enabled in n8n, it forces the node to output a result even when the condition is not met, leading to an empty JSON object being sent to the next steps.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the if statement node
Test the workflow again with one record
agent_instruction: Disable the 'always output data' option in the if statement settings.
